case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF VS. NALLS FOUNDATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NALLS FOUNDATION, INC. DBA  FD HOMES $4,879.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,910.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY REPRESENTED JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NALLS FOUNDATION, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
